text.title: Gcp Arch Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-arch-patterns methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Select reference pattern (GKE / Cloud SQL HA / data pipeline / CDN / Cloud Run).

step.name: draft-spec
step.action: Compose architecture-spec with components + rationale + HA strategy + security controls.

step.name: review
step.action: Cross-check against rules (regional GKE, Cloud SQL REGIONAL+PITR, Workload Identity, …).

step.name: ratify
step.action: Get architect sign-off; commit to repo.
